allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command nvm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "PATH entries containing 'node' or 'nvm':"; $env:Path -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|nvm|npm' })
